title: Sphinctanthus polycarpus
taxonomy: Sphinctanthus polycarpus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This family is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as the madder or coffee family. The Rubiaceae family consists of over 13,000 species, many of which are native to tropical and subtropical regions. Sphinctanthus polycarpus is likely part of a larger genus within the Rubiaceae family, but the exact classification may require further research. Further study would be needed to determine the specific classification of Sphinctanthus polycarpus within its genus.
